sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_datetime (event_time DateTime, formatted_time String);
INSERT INTO test_datetime (event_time, formatted_time) VALUES (toDateTime('2021-11-15 09:45:00'), formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(toDateTime('2021-11-15 09:45:00'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'));
UPDATE test_datetime SET formatted_time = formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_time, 'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm') WHERE event_time < toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT event_time, formatted_time FROM test_datetime WHERE formatted_time LIKE '2021-11-%';
DELETE FROM test_datetime WHERE formatted_time = formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(toDateTime('2021-11-15 09:45:00'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss');
